title: Wicker appoints retired Army General to National Defense Strategy commission
author: Filip Timotija
fullText: Sen. Roger Wicker (R-Miss.), the chairman of the Senate Armed Services Committee (SASC), told The Hill on Wednesday that he has appointed retired four-star U.S. Army Gen. Jack Keane to serve on the Commission on the National Defense Strategy (NDS).  “General Keane has faithfully served our country since the era of the Vietnam War. Few…
